reusableLibrary.title: Welcome
reusableLibrary.content:
Dear {{client_name}} Team,

We are absolutely thrilled to present this proposal for your upcoming brand expansion. Based on our preliminary discussions, we understand you are looking for a cohesive visual language and a robust platform build to support your growing market share.

Our team has successfully executed dozens of similar projects, and we bring a research-driven, design-forward approach to every engagement. We look forward to partnering with you on this journey.

Warmly,
The {{company_name}} Team

reusableLibrary.title: Financial Investment
reusableLibrary.subtitle: Transparent pricing breakdown with tax handling

blocks.title: Executive Summary
blocks.content:
Dear {{client_name}} Team,

We are absolutely thrilled to present this proposal for your upcoming brand expansion. Based on our preliminary discussions, we understand you are looking for a cohesive visual language and a robust platform build to support your growing market share.

Our team has successfully executed dozens of similar projects, and we bring a research-driven, design-forward approach to every engagement. We look forward to partnering with you on this journey.

Warmly,
The {{company_name}} Team

blocks.title: About {{company_name}}
blocks.content: {{company_name}} is a premier creative and digital agency dedicated to elevating brands through innovative design and full-stack engineering.

metadata.specialties: Video Production, UI/UX Design, Full-Stack Engineering, Digital Marketing
metadata.approach: User-centered, data-informed iterations with weekly milestone demos.

blocks.title: Scope of Services
blocks.subtitle: Tailored solutions for {{client_name}}'s visual and technical needs

services.name: Brand Strategy & Visual Identity
services.description: Competitor research, brand guidelines, color palettes, logotype, and typeface guidelines.
services.deliverables: Brand Book PDF, Vector Logo files, Social templates

services.name: Custom Platform Development
services.description: Next.js responsive website integration, customized CMS setup, analytics, and speed optimization.
services.deliverables: Production codebase, CMS login, staging access

blocks.title: Milestone Roadmap
blocks.subtitle: A step-by-step path to project completion

steps.title: Phase 1: Discovery & Strategy
steps.details: Market research, typography selections, wireframing reviews.

steps.title: Phase 2: Visual Execution
steps.details: High-fidelity mockups, brand assets compilation, interactive prototypes.

steps.title: Phase 3: Development & Integration
steps.details: Core UI implementation, API setups, responsive testing.

steps.title: Phase 4: QA & Deployment
steps.details: SEO analysis, security checks, final site launch.

blocks.title: Financial Investment
blocks.subtitle: Transparent pricing breakdown with tax handling

testimonials.quote: {{company_name}} completely revitalized our product branding. The feedback loop was fast and the design quality was world-class.
testimonials.author: Jane Miller, CEO at FinTech Solutions

testimonials.quote: Our site traffic increased by 65% within two months of releasing the new portal built by {{company_name}}.
testimonials.author: David Chen, VP of Marketing at CloudRetail

faqs.question: What happens if we need more revisions?
faqs.answer: Extra revisions are billed at our standard designer hourly rate of $100/hr, with advance approval.

faqs.question: Do we own the full intellectual property?
faqs.answer: Yes, 100% intellectual property ownership transfers to you automatically upon receipt of the final payment.

blocks.title: Terms & Conditions
listItems: Revision Policy: Additional revisions beyond the agreed scope will be billed hourly.
Timeline: contingent upon timely feedback from the client team.
Client Assets: Brand materials and copywriting copy must be delivered on schedule.
Payment Policy: Late payments may incur a 5% monthly compounding fee.

blocks.title: Acceptance of Proposal
blocks.subtitle: Please review and complete signatures to initiate development.
